CustomField.description: This field stores the total security deposit amount in cash. The user enters this value manually when creating the Security Deposit record. [LOAD: Yes] [JUSTIFICATION: Yes, This field stores the total security deposit amount in cash.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: NA] [COMMENTS: NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total cash security deposit amount agreed as part of the contract. This is a user-entered value.
CustomField.label: Stipulated Security Deposit (Cash)
